name: thinkific-courses
description: Reads and writes Thinkific Admin API v1 courses, bundles, categories, coupons, enrollments, orders, groups, instructors, products, promotions, reviews, users, and site scripts.

risk.read: external Thinkific Admin API read of course catalog, enrollment, commerce, user, group, promotion, review, and site-script data
risk.write: creates, updates, approves, denies, and deletes Thinkific enrollments, categories, coupons, external orders, groups, instructors, promotions, users, and site scripts; destructive deletes require approval
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
